name: Lemon Drop Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the shortening for 30 seconds.
2. Add sugar and continue to beat until light and fluffy.
3. Combine lemon juice and water.
4. Combine the dry ingredients (baking soda, cream of tartar, and flour).
5. Alternately mix the dry ingredients with the wet ingredients into the beaten mixture.
6. Mix well.
7. Drop spoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes at 450°F.
Makes about 60-70 cookies.
